{{Expand}}

{{Infobox location
| name = Blue Room
| introduced = The Crimson Vault
}}

== City of Light ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|The [[Ragnarus Incarnation]] was once sealed in a dungeon beneath the [[Blue Room]].<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c2">''City of Light'', chapter 2</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|The [[Blue Room]] was decimated with shattered blue tiles and red wood/stone.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c17">''City of Light'', chapter 17</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Traveler's Gate nav}}

[[Category:Locations]]
[[Category:City of Light]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate locations]]
[[Category:Structures]]
